meta.title: MD Builders - Izinsiza Zokwakha Ezinobuchwepheshe eGauteng
meta.description: Izinsiza zokwakha, ukuphenda, ukupenda, ukwendlala amatshe, ukubeka amathayela, kanye nezinsiza zamanzi eGauteng yonke.
meta.keywords: ukwakha, izinsiza zokwakha, ukuphenda, ukupenda, ukwendlala amatshe, ukubeka amathayela, Gauteng, Johannesburg, Pretoria

services.title: Izinsiza Zethu
services.description: Sinikeza izinsiza eziphelele zokwakha nokunakekelwa kuyo yonke iGauteng

paving.name: Ukwendlala Amatshe
paving.description: Izindlela zemoto, izindlela zokuhamba, nokwendlala amatshe ngaphandle

tiling.name: Ukubeka Amathayela
tiling.description: Amathayela aphansi nasezindongeni kuzo zonke izindawo

brickwork.name: Umsebenzi Wezitina
brickwork.description: Izinsiza zobuchwepheshe zokubeka izitina kanye nomsebenzi wokwakha izindonga nezakhiwo

concrete.description: Izisekelo, amapuleti, izindlela zemoto, nezakhiwo zekhonkrithi eziqinisiwe

fencing.name: Ucingo
fencing.description: Ucingo lokuphepha, izindonga zomngcele, nokufakwa kwamasango

installation.name: Ukufakwa
installation.description: Izinsiza zobuchwepheshe zokufakwa kwezinhlelo ezahlukahlukene nezinto

landscaping.name: Ukuhlela Ingadi
landscaping.description: Ukuklama kwengadi, ukuhlela ingadi yangaphandle, nokulungisa umhlaba

repairs.name: Ukulungisa
repairs.description: Izinsiza zokusiza ngokushesha nezokuhlelwa kokulungisa zonke izidingo zokwakha

roofing.name: Uphahla
roofing.description: Ukufakwa kophahla, ukulungiswa, ukunakekelwa, nokuvimbela amanzi

about.title: Nge-MD Builders
about.subtitle: Umlingani Wakho Othembekile Wokwakha eGauteng
about.heroSubtitle: Sakha ukwethembana, iphrojekthi eyodwa ngesikhathi kuyo yonke iGauteng Province

story.title: Indaba Yethu
story.content: Yasungulwa ngu-Meshack Dlamini, i-MD Builders isebenzele umphakathi waseGauteng iminyaka engaphezu kwe-15. Okwaqala njengephrojekthi encane yokwakha sekukhule kwaba elinye lamagama athembekile kakhulu ekwakheni kwamakhaya nezebhizinisi kuyo yonke iJohannesburg, iPretoria, nezindawo ezizungezile.

mission.title: Inhloso Yethu
mission.content: Ukuhlinzeka ngezinsiza zokwakha eziyingqayizivele ezedlula okulindelwe amakhasimende ethu kuyilapho sigcina amazinga aphezulu ekhwalithi, ukuphepha, nobungcweti. Sikholelwa ekwakheni ubudlelwano obuzophepha ngokuxhumana okungobuqotho nomsebenzi ongcono.

items.title: Ikhwalithi Kuqala
items.description: Asikaze senze isivumelwano ngekhwalithi. Yonke iphrojekthi ithola ukunakwa kwethu okuphelele kwimininingwane nokuzibophezela ekubeni ngcono.

items.title: Ukuthembeka
items.description: Amakhasimende ethu angathembela kithi ukuthi sizoletha amaphrojekthi ngesikhathi nangaphakathi kwesabelomali, njalo.

items.title: Ubuqotho
items.description: Amanani angobuqotho, ukuxhumana okucacile, nezindlela zebhizinisi ezinomthetho kuholela konke esikwenzayo.

items.title: Ukuphepha
items.description: Sigcina amazinga aphezulu okuphepha ukuvikela iqembu lethu, amakhasimende, nezakhiwo zawo.

experience.title: Kungani Ukhethe i-MD Builders?
items: Sisebenzela zonke izindawo kuyo yonke iGauteng

steps.title: Intengo
steps.description: Amanani aqondile, acacile ngaphandle kwezindleko ezifihlekile

ourWork.noResults: Awekho amaphrojekthi atholakele ahambisana nezidingo zakho

form.error: Yehluleka ukuthumela umlayezo. Sicela uzame futhi noma usishayele ngqo.

serviceAreas.title: Izindawo Zensiza
serviceAreas.description: Sisebenzela ngokuziqhenya amakhasimende akhaya nezebhizinisi kuyo yonke iGauteng Province

faq.title: Imibuzo Ebuzwa Njalo
faq.subtitle: Imibuzo Evamile Ngezinsiza Zethu Zokwakha
faq.heroSubtitle: Thola izimpendulo zemibuzo evame ukubuzwa ngezinsiza zethu

items.question: Ninikeza izintengo zamahhala?
items.answer: Yebo, sinikeza izintengo zamahhala, ezingenasibopho kuzo zonke izinsiza zethu. Sixhumane nje nathi ngemininingwane yephrojekthi yakho futhi sizobeka isikhathi esifanele sokuhlola izidingo zakho.

items.question: Yiziphi izindawo enizisebenzela?
items.answer: Sisebenzela zonke izindawo kuyo yonke iGauteng Province, kufaka phakathi iJohannesburg, iPretoria, iEast Rand, iWest Rand, nezindawo ezizungezile. Sixhumane nathi ukuze siqinisekise ukumbozwa kwendawo yakho ethile.

items.question: Ninezitifiketi futhi ninenshuwarensi?
items.answer: Yebo, i-MD Builders inezitifiketi ezigcwele futhi inenshuwarensi. Siphatha inshuwarensi yesibopho esiphelele ukuvikela kokubili amakhasimende ethu neqembu lethu ngesikhathi sawo wonke amaphrojekthi.

about.title: Ngo-Meshack Dlamini
about.description: Enamava angaphezu kweminyaka eyi-15 embonini yokwakha, u-Meshack Dlamini wakhe igama lokusebenza kahle nokusebenza okuthembekile kuyo yonke iGauteng.
about.experience: Kusukela ekulungiseni amakhaya amancane kuya emiphakathini emikhulu yokwakha, sinikeza imiphumela eyingqayizivele ehlala isikhathi eside.

items.text: U-Meshack neqembu lakhe benze umsebenzi omuhle kakhulu ekuvuseleni ikhishi lethu. Abangobuchwepheshe, abathembekile, futhi banakekela imininingwane.
items.name: Sarah Johnson

items.text: Umsebenzi omangalisayo wokwendlala amatshe endleleni yethu yemoto. Waqedwa ngesikhathi futhi ngaphakathi kwesabelomali. Kunconywa kakhulu!
items.name: David Smith

items.text: Umsebenzi wokuphenda wawuphelele. Uhlanzekile, ungobuchwepheshe, futhi ikhwalithi yokuqeda yadlula okulindelwe yithi.
items.name: Maria Gonzalez

footer.mission: Ukuhlinzeka ngezinsiza zokwakha ezikhwalithile kuyo yonke iGauteng ngobuqotho, ubungcweti, nokunakekela imininingwane.
